prerequisites: A Capsule CRM account with access to My Preferences > API Authentication Tokens.
A Personal Access Token generated from that page, supplied as the bearer_token credential.
The entity to sync (configured via the required entity field).
A start_date to bound the records pulled (configured via the required start_date field).

authMethods.name: Personal Access Token (Bearer token)
authMethods.summary: Maps to the connector's bearer_token secret field. Generate a Personal Access Token in Capsule under My Preferences > API Authentication Tokens, then provide it as bearer_token. The API sends it on every request as an Authorization: Bearer {token} header. Invalid or expired tokens return HTTP 401; insufficient permissions return HTTP 403.

setupSteps.title: Generate a Personal Access Token in Capsule
setupSteps.body: Sign in to Capsule CRM and open My Preferences > API Authentication Tokens. Create a token for direct integration use. Copy it immediately, as it is the value you will supply to the connector.

setupSteps.title: Provide the token as bearer_token
setupSteps.body: Enter the Personal Access Token into the connector's required bearer_token field. The connector authenticates each API v2 request with an Authorization: Bearer {token} header.

setupSteps.title: Choose the entity to sync
setupSteps.body: Set the required entity config field to select which Capsule entity the connector should read.

setupSteps.title: Set the start_date
setupSteps.body: Set the required start_date config field to bound the records the connector pulls from that point forward.
